creator: yuri.pankov@gmail.com
text:
Sorry for chiming in... Just wondering because ^T is working for me
without this patch (and was working in previous versions) - are there
some special conditions when it doesn't work?

> echo $TERM $XTERM_VERSION
xterm XTerm(229)
> sleep 10
load: 0.07  cmd: sleep 9591 [nanslp] 0.00u 0.00s 0% 656k


Yuri
